title: First Run
description: An interactive setup tutorial that guides the user through a safe first launch.

steps.title: Welcome
steps.body: This interactive first-run tutorial will guide you through a safe starting setup that does not require optional avatar packs. For this tutorial, follow the requested actions when they appear.

steps.title: Choose No Avatar
steps.body: For a first launch, please choose None as the Avatar Engine. That lets you verify chat and speech before enabling heavier avatar systems such as MuseTalk.

steps.title: Enable Stream Mode
steps.body: For this tutorial, please turn Stream Mode on. Stream Mode lets NC start speaking before the full assistant reply is complete, which is helpful for realtime avatar testing.

steps.title: Observe the TTS Backend
steps.body: Check the TTS Backend here. Chatterbox is the public default; optional backends such as PocketTTS or Gemini TTS can be installed and selected later.

steps.title: Check the Model
steps.body: This is where you choose the LM Studio model. For this tutorial, make sure LM Studio is running and that a model is available here before you continue.

steps.title: Persona Tab
steps.body: This is the Persona tab. It contains voice settings, expressive tags, and the system prompt. Push Next when you are ready to load the tutorial persona.

steps.title: Load the Tutorial Persona
steps.body: For this tutorial, please click Load to load the bundled Tutorial_Persona preset.

steps.title: Initialize the System
steps.body: When LM Studio is ready, please click INITIALIZE SYSTEM. The tutorial will continue automatically after you do it.

steps.title: Try MuseTalk Later
steps.body: Once chat and speech work, MuseTalk can be enabled later from Avatar Engine after its runtime and at least one avatar pack are installed.

steps.title: Dry Run Later
steps.body: After you have the system working, the Dry Run tab can profile your hardware and recommend better chunking and startup settings. You do not need to do that immediately.
